name: @intentsolutionsio/secret-scanner
description: Scan codebase for exposed secrets, API keys, passwords, and sensitive credentials

scripts.postinstall: node -e "console.log(\"\\n→ This npm package is a tracking/proof artifact. Install the plugin via:\\n  ccpi install secret-scanner\\n  or /plugin install secret-scanner@claude-code-plugins-plus in Claude Code\\n\")"
